shorts.title: Scranton firefighters honored in ceremony
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Friday night, Scranton firefighters took center stage for a night of service, sacrifice, and recognition. The department brought its swearings-in, promotions, and awards together for one major ceremony, honoring six new firefighters and acts of bravery. Service, dedication, and honor were highlighted at the ceremony. "It's a great opportunity to [...]
